evals.expected_output: Stops with a message telling the user to run /sealos-deploy first and does not generate HTML

evals.prompt: /sealos-canvas in a deployed repo when ~/.sealos/kubeconfig is unavailable
evals.expected_output: Stops with a kubeconfig unavailable message and does not attempt deploy/update behavior

assertions.name: view-only
assertions.description: Does not run kubectl apply, patch, delete, rollout, restart, or set image commands

evals.prompt: /sealos-canvas in a deployed repo with mock Kubernetes resources
evals.expected_output: Starts a local canvas UI, returns local_url, and renders app, URL, resource cards, volume strip, details, and SVG edges

assertions.name: returns-local-url
assertions.description: Returns ok=true with a http://127.0.0.1 local_url

assertions.name: renders-topology
assertions.description: Local UI contains resource nodes and connector edges

assertions.name: includes-volume-strip
assertions.description: PVC or volume references are rendered as attached strips

assertions.name: includes-detail-panel
assertions.description: Local UI includes a selected resource detail panel

evals.prompt: /sealos-canvas with Secret resources in the namespace
evals.expected_output: Shows only Secret names/types/reference relationships and never writes Secret data values to HTML

assertions.name: does-not-render-secret-data
assertions.description: HTML does not contain Secret .data values

assertions.name: renders-secret-safely
assertions.description: Secret nodes show names and metadata only
